holdings.infoBox: LGH is an equity ETF with a total of 419 individual holdings. The top holdings are Direxion Daily S&P 500 Bull 3X ETF stock at 19.49%, NVIDIA at 6.94%, Apple at 6.37%, Microsoft at 4.09%, and Amazon.com at 3.41%.

overview.description: The HCM Defender 500 Index ETF (LGH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the HCM Defender 500 index. The fund tracks a proprietary index that toggles between US large-cap stocks and Treasurys, or a combination of both, depending on risk in the US equity market. LGH was launched on Oct 10, 2019 and is issued by HCM.
